# Introduction

This fixture verifies English M.Sc. thesis output with a long title, a
co-advisor, five committee members, list of figures, list of tables, references,
and appendices. The body cites Figure \ref{fig-flow}, Figure \ref{fig-wide},
@tbl-small, and @tbl-wide. Bibliography processing is exercised with
@apa2020 and @quarto2026.

## Objective

The objective is to verify that Quarto-generated content and the official ITU
frontmatter remain consistent when the `ingilizce` class option is selected.

\begin{figure}
\centering
\fbox{\begin{minipage}{0.7\linewidth}
\centering
\vspace{1cm}
Source $\rightarrow$ Render $\rightarrow$ PDF
\vspace{1cm}
\end{minipage}}
\caption{A long process figure caption used to test line wrapping in the list of figures and to confirm that English list labels are emitted for an English thesis.}
\label{fig-flow}
\end{figure}

| Measure | Description |
|---|---|
| Language | English class option |
| Degree | Master of Science |
| Advisor | Long name and co-advisor |

: A compact numbered table for the English fixture. {#tbl-small}
